title: morus alba subvar. colombassa
intro: Morus alba subvar. colombassa, also known as the white mulberry or colombassa mulberry, is a variety of the white mulberry tree native to Asia and widely cultivated for its edible fruit and medicinal properties. The bark, leaves, and fruit of the Morus alba subvar. colombassa plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Morus alba subvar. colombassa include infusions of the leaves and fruit, as well as decoctions of the bark, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
